title: PREGNANCY AND PARENT SUPPORT SERVICES - 211info
text: HOPE PREGNANCY CENTER PREGNANCY AND PARENT SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A faith-based agency that provides information and referrals to those who are experiencing unplanned pregnancies. Services include pro-life counseling, pregnancy testing, limited obstetrical ultrasound, parenting support, limited STI testing and community referrals. Does not provide referrals for abortion services or birth control. Clients who participate in the classes are eligible to receive maternity and infant clothes, diapers, and other infant care needs. 17 SW 6th Street Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Medical services: Monday/Thursday 10am-5pm, Wednesday 1pm-5pm Education day only, no medical services offered: Tuesday noon-5pm Email (541) 889-4272 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 889-4272 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Baker and Malheur Counties Services: Baby Clothing Diapers Pregnancy Testing Pro-Life Pregnancy Counseling Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOPE PREGNANCY CENTER
